variants: Titus Gaudreau is a skilled artisan who holds an Obsidian Smithing Certificate, signifying his expertise in crafting unique metalwork. He receives primary funding for his projects from the Frostspire Initiative Network, allowing him to pursue his passion. In addition to his professional endeavors, Titus is also a dedicated civic leader, serving as a Benefactor of Willowbend Habitat Network, which focuses on creating sustainable environments. He often communicates his ideas and techniques using Italian phonetics, further illustrating his diverse skill set.
